decision.summary: No new action: the only active thesis position left is the weekly 80k reach, and with just 4 hours left in the daily session there is no clean new edge worth forcing.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. Binance spot is 78885.59, still only 0.74% below the 24h high, but the latest Beecthor thesis from 2026-04-22 treats the 79.5k-80k area as the likely exhaustion and shorting zone unless the market extends much higher later. The portfolio already carries that remaining upside expression through the active weekly 80k reach, while the old weekly 72k dip and the daily 80k reach are both now discarded_for_slot and no longer block anything. For the daily board, only 4 hours remain until expiry and the nearest upside continuation, 80k reach, now trades around 15.5%, which is both well below the preferred range and an example of a late-session extension that is more likely to miss timing than to resolve cleanly before midnight. The nearest downside dailies are also too weakly priced to justify a same-day bearish entry without a clear reversal already underway. On the weekly side, the next upside strike, 82k reach, sits around 33.5%, below the preferred band and would amount to chasing farther continuation exactly where Beecthor is warning about exhaustion. No open position is in the 90-95% take-profit zone. The correct action is to hold the live weekly 80k thesis and avoid opening fresh positions into a late-session, potentially exhausted zone.
